# Upgrade Plan

## Overview
Upgrade Java project to latest LTS versions (Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4).

## Target Versions
- **Java**: 21 (LTS)
- **Spring Boot**: 3.4
- **Spring Framework**: 6.x

## Migration Scope
- Upgrade JDK to version 21
- Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4
- Migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespace (if applicable)
- Update deprecated APIs
- Ensure dependency compatibility

## Tasks
See `tasks.json` for detailed task breakdown and execution tracking.
